ddls:
CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "billing_country" TEXT /* Billing country for the account */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the account (e.g., referral, marketing campaign) */,
  "account_created_date" TEXT /* Date the account was created */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the account (e.g., finance, healthcare) */,
  "company_size" TEXT /* Size of the account (e.g., small, medium, large) */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opportunities" (
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opportunity */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* ID of the account associated with the opportunity */,
  "opportunity_name" TEXT /* Name of the opportunity */,
  "opportunity_type" TEXT /* Type of opportunity (e.g., new business, upsell, cross-sell) */,
  "sales_contract_no" TEXT /* Sales contract number associated with the opportunity */,
  "quote_type" TEXT /* Type of quote (e.g., binding, non-binding) */,
  "delivery_terms" TEXT /* Delivery terms for the opportunity */,
  "opportunity_stage" TEXT /* Current stage of the opportunity (e.g., prospecting, demo, proposal) */,
  "close_date" TEXT /* Date the opportunity was closed */,
  "won_lost_reason" TEXT /* Reason for winning or losing the opportunity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opportunity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_opportunities_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity associated with the contract */,
  "contract_date" TEXT /* Date the contract was signed */,
  "contract_amount" REAL /* Amount of the contract */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the contract */,
  "contract_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the contract in months */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_contracts_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quotes" (
  "quote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quote */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity associated with the quote */,
  "quote_date" TEXT /* Date the quote was issued */,
  "quote_amount" REAL /* Amount of the quote */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the quote */,
  "valid_until" TEXT /* Date until the quote is valid */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quotes_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "deliveries" (
  "delivery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each delivery */,
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* ID of the contract associated with the delivery */,
  "delivery_date" TEXT /* Date the delivery was made */,
  "delivery_amount" REAL /* Amount of the delivery */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency of the delivery */,
  "delivery_status" TEXT /* Status of the delivery (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("delivery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_deliveries_contract_id FOREIGN KEY ("contract_id") REFERENCES sales_contracts ("contract_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity associated with the product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_family" TEXT /* Family of the product */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the product */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_team" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales team */,
  "opportunity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opportunity associated with the sales team */,
  "team_member" TEXT /* Name of the sales team member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the sales team member (e.g., sales manager, sales representative) */,
  "sales_target" REAL /* Sales target for the sales team member */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Achievements of the sales team member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_team_opportunity_id FOREIGN KEY ("opportunity_id") REFERENCES opportunities ("opportunity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales performance record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sales team associated with the performance record */,
  "period" TEXT /* Period for which the performance is measured (e.g., quarterly, annually) */,
  "actual_sales" REAL /* Actual sales achieved by the sales team */,
  "target_sales" REAL /* Target sales for the sales team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES sales_team ("team_id")
)
column_names: Source of the account (e.g., referral, marketing campaign)
Industry of the account (e.g., finance, healthcare)
